key_concepts: 1/√d_k的方差分析——数学必然,非调参产物
Multi-Head Attention = 低秩分解: h个d_k维子空间逼近全秩
GQA/MQA: KV压缩比与精度trade-off (75% KV节省, <1%精度损失)
Triton Fused Attention Kernel: tiled matmul + online softmax
HBM traffic: naive O(L²) vs tiled O(L) — IO-aware computing
summary.narrative_tone: 0基础入口(一个词的意思取决于上下文)→HPC深度(Triton kernel的SRAM布局), knowledgeable friend with HPC rigor
summary.running_example_stage: 用3 token × 4 dim手算softmax + LLaMA-3.2-1B参数做KV Cache量化对比
